title: Idle Alive
description: Idle Alive adds subtle idle animations to your player
body:
**Idle Alive** adds subtle idle animations to your player when you stand still for a while. After a configurable period of inactivity, one random animation is chosen from your enabled animation pool. Any movement or action immediately stops the current idle animation.

Features:
- Random idle animations after inactivity
- Configurable idle delay
- Built-in animation selection
- Support for custom external animations
- Clean interruption on movement or player actions

## A bit more polished
**Idle Alive** makes your character feel less static by playing random idle animations whenever you stay inactive for a set amount of time. The animation pool is configurable, supports custom user-added animations, and instantly stops when you move, use an item, or otherwise break idle state.

**STILL IN DEVELOPMENT**
